summary: Iteration 69 - All fixes verified. 13 backend tests passed (100%). Stock Screener is properly contained in app layout (NOT popup). All 4 calculator APIs working with Query params. 3 new Trading pages (Bonds, Cash & Term Deposits, Managed Funds) load correctly with demo data. Default route redirects to /daily-briefing. Navigation shows all new Trading items.

issues: Compliance modal appears on page load - blocks interactions until dismissed

critical_code_review_comments: StockResearch.jsx correctly wrapped with Layout component - NO LONGER a popup
analysis.py calculator endpoints properly accept Query params via Query() decorator
BondsTrading.jsx, CashDeposits.jsx, ManagedFunds.jsx created with demo data
Layout.jsx navigation includes all Trading items: Stocks & ETFs, Bonds, Cash & Term Deposits, Managed Funds
App.js default route correctly redirects / to /daily-briefing
All new pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - all new pages use in-memory demo data

Navigation sidebar in Personal Mode shows Trading section with: Stocks & ETFs, Bonds, Cash & Term Deposits, Managed Funds, Research Reports, Stock Screener, Live Prices.
